name: Opus Builders - Open Concept Remodeling
description: Professional Open Concept Remodeling services in Sierra Madre. Opus Builders is a Los Angeles, California construction company offering residential and commercial design-build services, including custom luxury home construction, high-end renovations, and modern minimalist architectural design. Services include in-house design, project planning, and full construction management, providing end-to-end solutions for clients seeking high-quality, turnkey building projects.
